title: meliaceae
intro: The meliaceae rank is a taxonomical rank that belongs to the classification of flowering plants, specifically a family of trees and shrubs. It is a botanical family characterized by its distinctive flowers and fruits, often with a single seed in each fruit. The meliaceae family includes approximately 380 species, commonly known as mahogany, mangrove, and neem trees, among others. These plants are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world.
